name: The Universal Language of CSI:Unifying Wireless Sensing Across Devices and Environments

description: arXiv:2607.09727v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: WiFi sensing based on Channel State Information (CSI) promises ubiquitous, device-free perception, yet current research remains trapped in a Tower of Babel - fragmented into isolated silos where models are tailored to specific hardware dialects, fixed environments, and narrow tasks. The primary bottleneck is the Heterogeneity Gap: the disparity...
author: Jiayi Chen, Weiting Ou, Guangxu Zhu
